_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin Deficiency Induces Endothelial Cell Proliferation and Retinal Neovascularization.

_contextSnippet: The number of branching capillaries adjacent to the avascular retina was increased in Nf1+/− mice when compared with WT mice
details: Increased number of branching capillaries adjacent to avascular retina compared to WT mice
